metadata.generated_for: NimbusFlow Customer Success FTE — Incubation Phase

tickets.subject: Can't log in — account locked
tickets.content: Hi, I've been trying to log into my NimbusFlow account for the past 30 minutes and it keeps saying my account is locked. I haven't changed my password and I'm sure it's correct. This is urgent — we have a sprint planning session in 1 hour. Please help ASAP.
tickets.resolution: Inform about 10-failed-login lock policy, 30-min auto-unlock, offer immediate manual unlock via support.

tickets.subject: Password reset
tickets.content: hi how do i reset password
tickets.resolution: Send link to nimbusflow.io/forgot-password, note 1-hour expiry.

tickets.subject: GitHub webhook not firing
tickets.message: We set up the GitHub integration last week and the webhook was working fine. Since yesterday, commits with NF-[id] are no longer auto-closing tasks. We haven't changed anything on our end. We're on the Business plan.
tickets.resolution: Advise re-authorize from Settings > Integrations > GitHub > Reconnect. Check NF-123 format (dash not hash).

tickets.subject: Requesting refund for annual subscription
tickets.content: We purchased an annual Business plan 3 weeks ago but our team decided to go with another tool. We'd like a full refund of the $8,700 we paid. Please process this as soon as possible.
tickets.resolution: Escalate to billing@nimbusflow.io. Annual refund policy: prorated within 30 days. Amount > $500 requires human approval.

tickets.subject: API rate limit
tickets.content: getting 429 errors on the api. what are the limits for growth plan
tickets.resolution: Growth plan: 300 requests/minute. Advise reduce frequency or upgrade to Business (1000 req/min).

tickets.subject: SSO setup help
tickets.message: We're trying to configure SAML SSO with Okta for our Business plan. We've downloaded the metadata XML from NimbusFlow and configured it in Okta but we're getting an error: 'InResponseTo attribute mismatch'. Can you help?
tickets.resolution: Guide through Settings > Security > SAML SSO. InResponseTo error usually means clock skew or wrong ACS URL. If unresolved after 2 attempts, escalate to technical team.

tickets.subject: I want to talk to a human right now
tickets.content: I am incredibly frustrated. I've been going back and forth with your support for 3 days on a billing issue and no one has resolved it. I DEMAND to speak with a real person. If this isn't resolved today I'll be disputing the charge with my bank.
tickets.resolution: Immediate escalation. Acknowledge frustration, do NOT attempt to resolve billing. Human urgency: high.

tickets.subject: How to add team members
tickets.content: how do i add more people to my workspace?
tickets.resolution: Settings > Team > Invite Members. Enter emails. Set role (Admin/Member/Viewer). Invites expire in 7 days.

tickets.subject: Need to export all our data — GDPR request
tickets.content: We have a GDPR data subject access request from one of our employees. We need to export all data associated with their account including tasks, comments, and time logs. How do we do this?
tickets.resolution: Settings > Privacy > Request My Data for individual users. Or Settings > Data > Export for full workspace. Processed within 72 hours.

tickets.subject: API authentication failing
tickets.message: Our API calls are returning 401 Unauthorized even though we're using the correct API key. We regenerated the key yesterday and the issue persists. We're making requests to api.nimbusflow.io/v2/tasks. Authorization header: Bearer [key]
tickets.resolution: Confirm key from Settings > Developer > API Keys. Ensure 'Bearer ' prefix in header. Check if key was generated for correct workspace. 401 can also mean key was revoked.

tickets.subject: LEGAL NOTICE — Data breach
tickets.content: I am writing to inform you that we believe there has been unauthorized access to our company data within NimbusFlow. Our legal team is preparing documentation. We need all logs of access to our workspace (acmecorp.nimbusflow.io) for the past 90 days immediately. Our lawyers will be in contact.
tickets.resolution: CRITICAL escalation. Route to security@nimbusflow.io and legal@nimbusflow.io simultaneously. Do not provide any data or make any admissions.

tickets.subject: Mobile app not syncing
tickets.content: app not syncing tasks. been 2 hrs
tickets.resolution: Pull to refresh. Log out and back in. Check internet. Sync delay max 60 seconds when reconnected.

tickets.subject: Can't create more than 3 projects
tickets.message: When I try to create a 4th project I get an error 'Project limit reached'. We thought we were on the Growth plan but apparently something happened. How do I check what plan we're on and how do I upgrade?
tickets.resolution: Starter plan limit is 3 projects. Check plan at Settings > Billing. Upgrade to Growth ($12/user/mo) for unlimited. Explain upgrade process.

tickets.subject: Slack integration — not receiving notifications
tickets.content: Hi, we set up the Slack integration about a week ago. We're getting some notifications (task created) but not others (status changes). We've checked the notification settings and everything seems enabled. Any ideas?
tickets.resolution: Check Settings > Integrations > Slack — verify event types selected. Re-authorize Slack integration. Check Slack bot permissions in Slack workspace admin.

tickets.subject: Pricing
tickets.content: whats the difference between growth and business plans price wise
tickets.resolution: Growth: $12/user/month. Business: $29/user/month. Key differences: Business adds velocity tracking, custom workflows, SSO, priority support.

tickets.subject: Can I get a discount on annual plan?
tickets.content: Hi, we're a small nonprofit team of 8. We love NimbusFlow but the annual cost is a bit high for us. Is there any nonprofit discount or can you offer us a better deal on the annual Business plan? We'd love to stay on NimbusFlow long-term.
tickets.resolution: Cannot offer discounts without approval. Escalate to sales@nimbusflow.io for nonprofit pricing. Annual billing saves 2 months (mention this).

tickets.subject: Sprint velocity
tickets.content: is velocity chart available on growth plan?
tickets.resolution: Velocity tracking is available on Business and Enterprise plans, not Growth. Offer to explain Business plan features.

tickets.subject: Webhook signature verification failing
tickets.message: We're receiving webhooks from NimbusFlow but our signature verification is failing. We're computing HMAC-SHA256 with our webhook secret but the signatures don't match. We're using Python requests library.
tickets.resolution: Webhook signature: HMAC-SHA256 of raw request body using webhook secret. Common issue: using parsed JSON instead of raw body. Also verify correct secret from Settings > Developer > Webhooks.

tickets.subject: Tasks disappearing from sprint
tickets.content: We've noticed that tasks are randomly disappearing from our active sprint. They're not moved to backlog either — they just seem to vanish. This has happened 3 times in the past week with different tasks. We're on Business plan. This is causing major problems for our team.
tickets.resolution: Data loss is critical. Escalate immediately to technical team. Request task IDs and sprint name. Do not attempt to resolve.

tickets.subject: Download mobile app
tickets.content: where can i download the ios app
tickets.resolution: Search NimbusFlow on App Store. Requires iOS 14+.

tickets.subject: Enterprise plan pricing and SLA details
tickets.content: We're a company of 200+ employees evaluating NimbusFlow for enterprise use. We need details on: 1) Enterprise pricing for 200 users 2) SLA guarantees 3) On-premises deployment options 4) SOC 2 audit reports 5) Data residency in EU. Can you connect us with a sales rep?
tickets.resolution: Route to csm@nimbusflow.io. Mention: SOC 2 Type II certified, EU data residency available, on-prem option exists, Enterprise is custom pricing.

tickets.subject: 2FA setup
tickets.content: how to enable 2fa?
tickets.resolution: Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Choose authenticator app (recommended), SMS, or hardware key (Enterprise). Follow setup wizard.

tickets.subject: Figma integration — frames not embedding
tickets.message: I'm trying to embed Figma frames in our task descriptions but I get a blank white box instead of the frame. I've pasted the share link from Figma. Are there specific URL formats I should use?
tickets.resolution: Use Figma embed link (not share link). In Figma: Share > Get embed code. Paste the iframe src URL into NimbusFlow task. Available on Growth and above.

tickets.subject: HIPAA compliance documentation
tickets.content: We are a healthcare technology company and need to verify NimbusFlow's HIPAA compliance before we can use it to manage our product development tasks. Can you provide a BAA (Business Associate Agreement) and confirm HIPAA compliance?
tickets.resolution: Escalate to legal@nimbusflow.io. HIPAA BAA is Enterprise-tier only. Do not make compliance claims without legal team confirmation.

tickets.subject: Story points
tickets.content: can i use custom fibonacci numbers or only the default ones
tickets.resolution: Standard Fibonacci scale is fixed (1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13). Custom scales are not currently supported. Can use Labels as a workaround.

tickets.subject: Invoice for March not received
tickets.content: Hello, we usually receive our monthly invoice on the 1st but we haven't received the March invoice yet. We're on Business plan with 25 seats. Our accounts payable department needs it for processing. Can you resend?
tickets.resolution: Escalate to billing@nimbusflow.io for invoice retrieval. They can resend from billing system.

tickets.subject: Task limit
tickets.content: is there a limit on how many tasks i can create
tickets.resolution: No task limit on any plan. Only project limit applies (3 on Starter, unlimited on Growth+).

tickets.subject: Can't delete workspace — need to cancel
tickets.message: We're closing our company and need to permanently delete our NimbusFlow workspace and cancel our subscription. How do I do this and will we receive a prorated refund for the remaining months?
tickets.resolution: Workspace deletion requires human confirmation for data security. Escalate to billing. Prorated refund on annual within 30 days policy applies.

tickets.subject: Suspicious login activity on our admin account
tickets.content: We received login notifications from IP addresses we don't recognize (somewhere in Eastern Europe). Our admin account may have been compromised. What should we do? Can you help us lock the account and review recent access logs?
tickets.resolution: CRITICAL. Route to security@nimbusflow.io immediately. Advise customer to change password NOW and enable 2FA while waiting. Do not provide account data.

tickets.subject: Slow app
tickets.content: nimbusflow really slow today is there an outage
tickets.resolution: Check status.nimbusflow.io for incidents. If no incident, suggest: different browser, clear cache, disable extensions. If widespread, acknowledge and share status page.

tickets.subject: Migrating from Jira
tickets.message: We're planning to migrate our 15-person team from Jira to NimbusFlow. We have 200+ existing issues across 5 projects. Is there a migration tool? What data can be imported and what's the best approach to minimize disruption?
tickets.resolution: Settings > Data > Import. Supports CSV import. For Jira: export as CSV from Jira, map fields, import to NimbusFlow. For complex migrations (5+ projects), recommend connecting with CSM team.

tickets.subject: Subtasks not appearing in sprint view
tickets.content: When I add subtasks to a parent task, the subtasks don't show up in the Sprint view, only the parent task does. Is this by design? We want our developers to be able to track their individual subtasks within the sprint. We're on Business plan.
tickets.resolution: By design — sprint view shows parent tasks. Subtasks visible in task detail view. Workaround: create subtasks as regular tasks and link as dependencies. This is consistent with Scrum methodology.

tickets.subject: Free plan projects
tickets.content: im on free plan how many projects can i make
tickets.resolution: Starter (free) plan: max 3 projects, up to 5 users, 5GB storage. Upgrade to Growth for unlimited.

tickets.subject: Custom webhook events not triggering
tickets.message: I've set up a webhook for task.updated events but it's only firing sometimes, not consistently. When I test it from the Settings page it works fine. But real task updates don't always trigger it. We process these events for our CI/CD pipeline.
tickets.resolution: Check webhook delivery logs in Settings > Developer > Webhooks > [webhook name] > Delivery History. Look for failed deliveries. Ensure endpoint returns 200 within 10 seconds (otherwise NimbusFlow retries 3x then stops). If inconsistent, escalate to technical.

tickets.subject: Feature request: Dark mode
tickets.content: Hi! Love NimbusFlow. Just wanted to request a dark mode option. Our team works late nights and the white interface is hard on the eyes. Any plans to add this? Would be a game changer for us!
tickets.resolution: Thank for feedback. Dark mode is on the product roadmap. Cannot confirm timeline. Suggest using browser/OS dark mode as temporary workaround. Note feedback is shared with product team.

tickets.subject: SSO Okta
tickets.content: do we need business plan for okta sso
tickets.resolution: Yes, SAML SSO (including Okta) is available on Business and Enterprise plans. Not available on Starter or Growth.

tickets.subject: Remove former employee from workspace
tickets.message: One of our employees left the company last week and we need to remove their account and revoke their access to NimbusFlow immediately. How do we do this and what happens to the tasks assigned to them?
tickets.resolution: Settings > Team > find user > Remove. Access revoked immediately. Their tasks remain and can be reassigned. Recommend reassigning open tasks before removal.

tickets.subject: GraphQL API documentation
tickets.content: We're building an internal tool that integrates with NimbusFlow. The REST API docs are helpful but I can't find comprehensive GraphQL documentation. Specifically looking for subscription types for real-time updates. Where can I find these?
tickets.resolution: GraphQL docs: docs.nimbusflow.io/api/graphql. Schema explorer at api.nimbusflow.io/graphql (with API key). Subscriptions available for real-time task and sprint events. For advanced integration questions, can connect with developer relations team.

tickets.subject: Time tracking
tickets.content: is there time tracking on growth plan?
tickets.resolution: Yes, time tracking is included in Growth plan. Log time from task detail view > Time tab. Export time logs from Settings > Data > Export.

tickets.subject: Bulk import tasks from CSV
tickets.message: We have a spreadsheet with 500+ tasks from our old system. Is there a way to bulk import these into NimbusFlow? If so, what format does the CSV need to be in?
tickets.resolution: Settings > Data > Import > CSV. Required columns: Title. Optional: Description, Assignee (email), Priority, Status, Due Date, Labels. Max 1000 tasks per import. Template available on import page.

tickets.subject: YOUR SERVICE IS ABSOLUTELY TERRIBLE
tickets.content: I cannot believe this. I've been a paying customer for 18 months and your product keeps getting WORSE with every update. My team lost 3 hours of work today because tasks DISAPPEARED. This is completely unacceptable. I'm going to tell every person I know to avoid NimbusFlow. What are you going to do about this???
tickets.resolution: Escalate immediately. Acknowledge frustration with empathy. Do not promise resolution. Route to account management team.

tickets.subject: Trial to paid
tickets.content: trial ending tomorrow how do i upgrade
tickets.resolution: Settings > Billing > Upgrade Plan. Choose Growth or Business. Add payment method. Trial tasks and data preserved after upgrade.

tickets.subject: Guest access for external stakeholders
tickets.content: We want to give some of our external stakeholders (clients) view-only access to specific projects without adding them as full members. Is there a guest or external viewer mode? We don't want to pay for full seats for people who just need to view progress.
tickets.resolution: Guest/viewer role is available. Set role to 'Viewer' when inviting — Viewers count as 0 paid seats on Business+ plans. On Growth, Viewers count as full seats. Share read-only project links also available.

tickets.subject: Push notifications
tickets.content: push notifications stopped working on android. checked settings still enabled
tickets.resolution: Try: clear app cache, log out and back in, re-enable notifications in Android system settings > Apps > NimbusFlow > Notifications. If persists, reinstall app.

tickets.subject: Kubernetes operator or Helm chart available?
tickets.message: We're evaluating NimbusFlow Enterprise and are interested in the on-premises deployment option. Do you provide a Helm chart or Kubernetes operator for self-hosted deployment? What are the infrastructure requirements?
tickets.resolution: On-premises is Enterprise only. Escalate to csm@nimbusflow.io for infrastructure requirements and deployment guide. Do not provide unverified technical specs.
Empty message edge case. Ask customer to describe their issue.

tickets.subject: Change workspace name
tickets.content: how to change the workspace url
tickets.resolution: Settings > General > Workspace Name. Note: changing workspace name also changes the URL (yourname.nimbusflow.io). Existing links will redirect for 30 days.

tickets.subject: Seat management — removing inactive users
tickets.message: We have 30 seats on our Business plan but only 22 people actively use the platform. 8 users haven't logged in for 60+ days. Can we remove them to reduce our bill? And if we remove them, can we re-add them later without losing their historical data?
tickets.resolution: Remove from Settings > Team. Seat freed at next billing. Historical data (tasks, comments) preserved. Re-add the same email later to restore their data access.

tickets.subject: Penetration test results sharing
tickets.content: As part of our vendor security assessment, we need to review NimbusFlow's latest penetration test results and security audit reports. Can you provide these? We specifically need the most recent SOC 2 Type II report.
tickets.resolution: SOC 2 Type II report available under NDA. Escalate to security@nimbusflow.io for report access. Do not share any internal security information directly.

tickets.subject: Task comments
tickets.content: can i mention someone in task comment?
tickets.resolution: Yes, type @username in any task comment to mention them. They'll receive an email and in-app notification.

tickets.subject: RE: RE: RE: Integration issue — still not resolved
tickets.content: This is my 4th email about the same GitHub webhook issue. I was told it would be resolved in 24 hours, then 48 hours, then it would be escalated. It's been 5 days. This is completely unacceptable. I need this working TODAY or I'm canceling.
tickets.resolution: Do not attempt technical resolution. Immediate escalation to account management. Acknowledge repeatedly failed resolution. Express genuine apology.

tickets.subject: NimbusFlow vs Asana — honest comparison
tickets.message: We're deciding between NimbusFlow and Asana for our team of 30. Can you give us an honest comparison of the two? What does NimbusFlow do better? What are the areas where Asana might be stronger?
tickets.resolution: Cannot discuss competitor comparisons per policy. Focus on NimbusFlow strengths: sprint planning, GitHub integration, API flexibility. Suggest free trial to evaluate fit. Escalate to sales if needed.

tickets.subject: Transfer workspace
tickets.content: need to transfer workspace ownership to a colleague how
tickets.resolution: Workspace ownership transfer requires verification for security. Escalate to support team. Cannot be done by AI agent due to account security implications.

tickets.subject: Partnership and API integration inquiry
tickets.content: We're building a developer tool that integrates with project management platforms including NimbusFlow. We're interested in becoming an official integration partner and possibly co-marketing. Who should I speak with about this?
tickets.resolution: Partnerships: partnerships@nimbusflow.io. API docs: docs.nimbusflow.io/api. Developer resources available. NimbusFlow has an integration marketplace — introduce via email.

tickets.subject: Feedback: bulk task editing would save us hours
tickets.message: Just wanted to share some feedback — we have sprints with 80+ tasks and updating assignees or priorities one at a time is incredibly tedious. Bulk editing (select multiple tasks, change assignee/priority/status at once) would save our PMs hours every sprint. Is this on the roadmap?
tickets.resolution: Thank for valuable feedback. Bulk editing is frequently requested. On the product roadmap but cannot confirm timeline. Workaround: use CSV export/import for bulk updates. Feedback shared with product team.
